text:
The Gold Dust Girl Guard is a non-player character (NPC) of the Greed Island game, as his name indicates, he stands guard outside the Gold Dust Girl's mansion. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 150 

Appearance

The Gold Dust Girl Guard dresses in a suit and tie. He has neatly combed hair, vague eyebrows, and a cleft chin. 

Personality

Initially, he comes off as calm and professional; however, when someone rescues the Gold Dust Girl from her mansion, he becomes belligerent. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Confronted by Gon and Biscuit, the guard immediately denies their request to see the Gold Dust Girl. He claims they'll trigger the traps within and will die before reaching the girl. Immediately after that statement, the guard is flabbergasted by Killua as he waltzes out of the mansion with the Gold Dust Girl in tow, claiming he found the girl in a secret room in B4 and thought the traps were an attraction of sort. In an act of hostility, the guard tries to attack Killua but is defeated with a single punch by the boy. Gon then picks up the guard's card and says it's an F-rank card. 

Card

His card Rank is F.
